scopeContract.corePromise: Explain how CLAUDE.md gives Claude Code persistent project memory across sessions
mustAnswer: Why does Claude Code lose context every session?
What is CLAUDE.md and where does it live?
How do you create and maintain a CLAUDE.md file?
shouldAnswer: What are the limits of CLAUDE.md?
How does session memory differ from API memory?

coverageMap.question: Why does Claude Code lose context every session?
coverageMap.answerSummary: Claude Code resets session state on each launch; CLAUDE.md is read automatically at startup to restore project context
coverageMap.gapAction: Show repeated setup as concrete visual metaphor

coverageMap.question: What is CLAUDE.md and where does it live?
coverageMap.answerSummary: A markdown file in the project root that Claude Code reads on every session start, containing project conventions and rules
coverageMap.gapAction: Display actual file content and location

coverageMap.question: How do you create and maintain a CLAUDE.md file?
coverageMap.answerSummary: Start with project context, add rules as you discover needs, review and prune periodically
coverageMap.gapAction: Show step-by-step creation with real examples

factEvidenceMap.claim: Claude Code reads CLAUDE.md at the start of every session
CLAUDE.md lives in the project root directory
Session setup time dropped from 5 minutes to 30 seconds after 30 days of CLAUDE.md usage
factEvidenceMap.qualification: Measured across 3 personal projects, not a controlled study
